collection.delete_confirm: Be ye certain ye want to scuttle this here collection, matey? Once 'tis sent to Davy Jones' locker, there be no bringin' it back!
collection.invite_token_warning: Invite marks be only shown but once, matey. Scrawl down the link now; ye'll not be layin' eyes on this here mark again after weighin' anchor or refreshin' this page.
collection.invites_delete_confirm: Be ye certain ye want to scuttle this here invite, matey?
collection.leave_confirm: Are ye truly fixin' to walk away from this here hoard, ye scallywag?
collection.left_collection: Ye be partin' ways with the hoard.

members.cannot_remove_last: Ye can't maroon the final swabbie.
members.empty: Nary a soul in this here hoard yet, matey.
members.name: Moniker
members.remove_confirm: Be ye certain ye want to maroon this member, matey?

no_collections.message: Ye be a lone wolf without a hoard, matey. Stake a claim on a new hoard for yer loot, or join a crew that's sent ye a summon.
no_collections.title: Nary a Hoard to be Seen
